title: Completeness Output
description: R15 CompletenessGate's 7-criterion check result. Produced by the orchestrator after every sub-agent has completed and before the Renderer fires. Each criterion is pass/fail/not_applicable with supporting evidence; aggregate is complete/incomplete.

definitions.description: R9. PASS if every chapter under analysis has its Definitions section retrieved or marked inline. FAIL if any chapter's Definitions are missing.

operative.description: R3. PASS if every assertion claim has ≥1 retrieval-backed cite.

exemptions.description: PASS when relies_on_exemption=true claims have the relevant exemption provisions in retrieval_log. NOT_APPLICABLE when no claim relies on an exemption.

regulations.description: R7. PASS if every delegation clause has a resolved implementing reg or explicit delegation_unresolved annotation. NOT_APPLICABLE if no delegations flagged.

cross_refs.description: R8. PASS if every cross-reference is retrieved or explicitly skipped with reason. FAIL if any silent omission.

currency.description: R10. PASS if every cited source is within threshold OR explicitly annotated. FAIL on stale_blocking.

classification.description: R12. PASS if every taxonomy category in classification_overlay is flagged or cleared with rationale.

aggregate.description: complete: all applicable criteria PASS. incomplete: any criterion FAIL. NOT_APPLICABLE criteria do not affect the aggregate.

incomplete_response_recommendation.description: When aggregate=incomplete, the orchestrator suggests next steps to resolve. Renderer uses this in place of the normal deliverable.

recommended_action.description: Single recommended next step. The Renderer renders this as the bottom-line instruction in the incomplete-notice.

instructions.description: Specific human-readable instructions, e.g., 'Run `agentic-law-os-ingestion ingest-statutes --jurisdiction US-IL --force-refresh` and re-submit.'

reason.description: Required when status != pass. Empty for pass.

supporting_doc_ids.description: Retrieved doc_ids that drive this criterion's status (positive evidence for pass, missing-expected for fail).
